spec_match.rationale: Accurately audits the security surface of opaque workers, correctly explaining that although BroadcastChannel and IndexedDB instantiate successfully, they are securely scoped/isolated to the null origin namespace.

interactive.rationale: Features an audit trigger button, a console log clearer, a live terminal logging framework, and a clean side-by-side vulnerability/fix finding checklist.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned with the feature description, letting users audit the four security boundary points.

edge_cases.rationale: Successfully maps out relative vs absolute paths, CSP restrictions, and catches worker setup exceptions cleanly.

references.rationale: Correctly cites the official ChromeStatus entry link and lists relative links that resolve successfully without 404 errors.

design_system.rationale: Applies proper styles, using beautiful security color indicators (red finding shields, green checked badges) and a dark CLI output log.
